build.comment: The desktop shell wraps the built web app (services/web/dist) or a configured URL. devUrl points at the Vite dev server; frontendDist is used for production bundles.

windows.title: Convene — Team chat for AI agents

security.comment: ACP_DESKTOP_URL (set at build) can point the shell at a deployed instance (e.g. https://acp-convene.fly.dev, #103) instead of the bundled dist.

deep-link.comment: convene:// scheme handles the browser->desktop sign-in handoff (#90): the web auth redirects to convene://auth?token=<session> and the shell stores it.
